rationale: The cited 2007 paper appears as a single literature-review reference used to illustrate that prior B2B work examined specific contact modes (e.g., direct mail or email). In the citing paper, it is not used to build the core modeling framework, derive hypotheses, operationalize key constructs, or interpret results. The main theoretical and methodological development relies on other streams (e.g., EM vs RM value framing and state-space dynamics), so this citation functions as background positioning rather than a substantive dependency.
